caption:
Your insecurities and fear dictate you wanting to control things … because you don’t want to lose to yourself or in front of others, instead of being self-aware and humble on who you actually are, and finding ways to create joy and success.

This is a simple perspective framework that so many are caught up in ... and I hope this little post creates a moment of clarity or debate that leads you to dramatically more happiness ❤️

#garyvee #mindset #perspective

latestComments.text: Next time swap the Y button to a V

Self-awareness is everything.

But most people think they’re self-aware…they just haven’t been tested properly.

It’s easy to feel in control until pressure exposes the gaps.

Do you think real clarity only shows up under pressure?

Most people waste energy fighting things they can’t control.

But the moment you focus on what is in your hands — habits, mindset, daily actions — life starts changing fast.

Simple shift. Huge results.

You can’t control everything.
But you ignore the few things you can.
It’s easy to get caught up in things outside our control, but that rarely moves anything forward.

caption:
You have so many opportunities .. you just have to believe you still have time to do them … it’s not lost on any of you that I struggle when people decide their life is “over” or they “blew it” or they “wasted their chance” … please my friends Sen this post to someone that needs the reminder that they had time to make all their dreams and hopes a reality .. regardless of their age ❤️❤️❤️❤️

#garyvee #advice #mindset
firstComment: I am 29 with the energy of someone going into their 70’s I’m cooked

latestComments.text: I am 29 with the energy of someone going into their 70’s I’m cooked
Main goal is stay happy - Never torture your brain to achieve things fast

Hi, 

My name is Lord Itamiyo, a Cameroonian artist based in Dallas, Texas. I’m currently working on my debut album “IsItTimeYet”, built on one simple but powerful motto: Walk by Faith, have Hope, and Always Love others.

This music comes from real life, real struggles, and real belief. It’s for anyone who’s ever felt like they’re waiting on God’s timing, pushing forward anyway, and choosing love even when it’s hard.
A 90 year old sleeps for 30 years. A 30 year old has slept for 10.

Having a person like Gary by your side for a month. Being one in complete silence and just listening and watching it day by day. That will be wonderful. Acquire part of your knowledge and then help others yourself. 🙌
I'm transferring to university in fall 2026 I will turn 32 in November 2026
I saw heroin addicts come clean in their late 50s and be successful and happy in their 60s
I need this Gary, thanks for the shouting. I’ll get em!

caption:
The content and access loop 🔂 all of you could be executing to help you make content, then connect with your audience and then use that connection to make more content … listen carefully to the e steps that help you create a content engine while creating depth with your audience … and yes of course at first it wil be small .. my first videos got less than 500 views and my first meet ups got less than 20 people there and my first u-streams ( look it up ) had less than 50 viewers :)):):):):

#socialmedia #advice #garyvee

latestComments.text: What is the “Google link at 9am” method is that a zoom call or something?
I immediately skip those posts... They're trash
Why not 10x it and to 10 a day

Yeah Amazing idea Gary-until you all realize that the government is catching on and is about to shut down these peptides because all of you want to be the viral guy—and they can't have you all giving out the alternative to their overpriced medications that make the industrial health complex richer you imbecile. Keep making all your peptide videos idiot—the government isn't watching any. 👍🏾
